mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE contact_type = #{contactType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE contact_type = #{contactType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_contact WHERE contact_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_contact ( contact_id, organization, contact_name, phone_number, email, contact_type, is_emergency, sort_order, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{contactId}, #{organization}, #{contactName}, #{phoneNumber}, #{email}, #{contactType}, #{isEmergency}0, #{sortOrder}0, #{notes}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_contact SET organization = #{organization}, contact_name = #{contactName}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, email = #{email}, contact_type = #{contactType}, is_emergency = #{isEmergency}is_emergency, sort_order = #{sortOrder}sort_order, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_contact SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
